description_long: This is a stylish women's wedge sandal featuring a vibrant red upper made of synthetic or genuine leather. The sandal has a high wedge heel and a platform sole, both covered in matching red material, with a beige outsole that has a slightly textured grip. The upper consists of two wide criss-cross straps over the toe area and a single ankle strap secured with a large, metallic silver buckle. The interior footbed is lightly cushioned and finished in a tan color, providing comfort and contrast to the bold exterior. The overall design is modern and chic, suitable for urban outings and summer wear. The construction appears sturdy, with clean stitching and a smooth, semi-gloss finish.
description: A red wedge sandal with criss-cross toe straps, a silver buckle ankle strap, and a high platform heel. The shoe features a smooth, semi-gloss finish and a beige cushioned footbed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wedge heel, criss-cross toe straps, and the metallic buckle on the ankle strap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the overlapping red straps and the open toe design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wedge heel and the clean lines of the ankle and toe straps.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the solid wedge heel and the back of the ankle strap.
